Meeting.title: Meeting Analysis
Meeting.description: A saved meeting analysis report with overview, transcript, and agenda items.

userId.description: The Google User UUID who owns this meeting analysis.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the analysis was saved.

audioFileName.description: The name of the analyzed audio file.

result.description: The JSON analysis output containing overview, main objectives, discussion summary, decisions, action items, pending issues, and notes.

transcript.description: A structured transcript with speaker tags and timestamps.

/meetings/{meetingId}.description: Saved meeting analyses categorized by unique meeting document IDs.
